generated_exposure.exposure_text: I just had a neighbor who spent thousands on a 'civil defense' bunker kit. Turns out it was mostly just overpriced camping gear. We don't need the government pushing these expensive scams on us. Let's focus on real preparedness - like community emergency training - instead of these gimmicks. #CommonSenseSecurity #NeighborhoodWatch
